response.justification: Bogdan is an experienced full-stack web and TypeScript engineer with strong event-driven and distributed systems background, but the role's core requirement — deep, production-grade C++ development — is almost entirely absent from his profile. His only C++ exposure was a six-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago and a student thesis project; his listed skills omit C++ entirely. Beyond the language gap, he has no industrial automation, IoT, MQTT, or industrial protocol experience (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.), no evidence of Secure Development Lifecycle or IEC 62443 practices, and no background in the on-premises industrial platform domain the role targets.
strengths: Strong event-driven and high-throughput distributed systems experience (Dunnhumby micro-services handling millions of requests/sec, GISCollective platform)
Solid REST API and web-stack expertise (Node.js, TypeScript, React) covering several of the advantageous skills listed
Consistent agile/TDD discipline and demonstrated ability to mentor others (Altom Selenium courses, Refactoring Dojos, open-source library authorship)
concerns: C++ experience is negligible — roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor-thesis project; no STL, concurrent C++, or systems-level C++ work in over a decade
No industrial automation, IoT, MQTT, or industrial protocol background (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850, DNP 3.0) anywhere in the profile
No evidence of Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL), IEC 62443, or any industrial-cybersecurity practice — a mandatory competency for this role
